latest_over_disclosed.title: Over-disclosed entity counts (synthetic LINT-04 anchor)
latest_over_disclosed.description: Synthetic methodology entry: plot function makes 3 SPARQL calls, JSON discloses 1.
latest_over_disclosed.methodology: Synthetic fixture for the LINT-04 soft-warn path.
latest_over_disclosed.interpretation: If LINT-04 fires here, the AST scan is wired correctly.
latest_over_disclosed.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(?aop) AS ?c)
FROM __GRAPH_URI__
WHERE { ?aop a <http://aopkb.org/aop_ontology#AdverseOutcomePathway> }
LIMIT 1
